He was introduced as the Killer of CHAPTER 14: Cursed Legacy, a Chapter DLC released on 3 December 2019 and retired on 8 January 2024. He is still available in the In-Game Store and as part of the Old Wounds Pack Chapter Pack DLC.

official_description: Michael Myers or "The Shape" is one of 43 Killers featured in Dead by Daylight. He was introduced as the Killer of CHAPTER 2: The HALLOWEEN® Chapter, a Chapter DLC originally released on 25th of October 2016 which was retired on 19th of January 2026. He remains a fully playable and supported Character in Dead by Daylight for all Players who purchased him before his Chapter left the Game. He originates from the 1978 Horror Movie franchise with the same name, Halloween.

It was introduced as the Killer of CHAPTER 29: Alien, a Chapter DLC released on 29 August 2023. It originates from the 1979 Sci-Fi Horror Movie Alien.
